title: Youtube Poop: Football is for Eggheads.
description:
Danny: I'm surprised that some people still find this funny, its my first and worst poop I have ever made, don't bother watching this one go look at the Remake.

Evan: A friend of mine's best youtube poop. He's tryin' his best with an old version of WMM, and if this gets good ratings, i'll put up more.

Danny: I have remade this video if you want to see it click here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7AhNp-prVpo&mode=user&search=
